evidence_snippet: - [Communication preferences](user_communication_preferences.md) — Concise responses, batch questions 5-8, delegation pattern, push protocol, two-locale awareness
- [Expertise profile](user_expertise_profile.md) — No-code orchestrator, builds through AI orchestration, meta-tooling focus, 269+ sessions
- [Decision authority](user_decision_authority.md) — What Claude decides (naming, implementation) vs what user retains (architecture, security, scope)
- [OS vision](user_os_vision.md) — Primary goal is project-agnostic 'Claude Code OS' — portable workflows, skills, agents. SoNash is secondary.
- [Creation mindset](user_creation_mindset.md) — Creates for joy, not shipping. Don't frame as MVP/delivery — frame as craft/exploration.
- [Convergence loops mandatory](feedback_convergence_loops_mandatory.md) — Every significant pass must loop internally until converged. Corrected 4+ times.
- [No pre-existing rejection](feedback_no_preexisting_rejection.md) — Never dismiss PR review items as pre-existing. Always present fix-or-DEBT options.
- [SWS is a meta-plan](feedback_sws_is_meta_plan.md) — SWS coordinates child plans and gates. Does NOT absorb child plan content.
- [PR review state files](feedback_pr_review_state_files.md) — pr-review must persist per-round counts in state files to survive compaction/clear.
- [Deep-plan hook discovery](feedback_deep_plan_hook_discovery_process.md) — 5-layer multi-agent discovery for hook/infrastructure audits with ground-truth verification.
- [Code review patterns](feedback_code_review_patterns.md) — PR description quality, rejection policy, review bot sequencing, PR timing discipline.
- [Execution failure recovery](feedback_execution_failure_recovery.md) — Stop-diagnose-confirm before retrying. No blind retries or destructive shortcuts.
- [Agent teams learnings](feedback_agent_teams_learnings.md) — Explore read-only, role separation, return protocol, parallel agents for impl. Teams via skill triggers.
- [Stale reviews dist](feedback_stale_reviews_dist.md) — SCHEMA_MAP test failures mean scripts/reviews/dist is stale. Fix: npm run reviews:render.
- [Pre-commit fixer report](feedback_precommit_fixer_report.md) — Present structured report and wait for confirmation before re-committing.
- [Learnings must complete](feedback_learnings_must_complete.md) — Learning entry + JSONL + state file are MANDATORY pr-review deliverables.
- [Grep lacks intelligence](feedback_grep_vs_understanding.md) — Don't grep for analysis or verification. Use JSON+jq for parsing, functional tests for verification.
- [Never skip user-action steps](feedback_user_action_steps.md) — When plans have install/auth/credential steps, PROMPT the user.
- [Deep-research formula insufficient](feedback_deep_research_formula.md) — Formula is FLOOR. Factor verification + challenge + gap-fill agents.
- [Deep-plan research check MANDATORY](feedback_deep_plan_research_check.md) — Never skip Phase 0 Step 3 research offer. Corrected 3x in one session.
- [Deep-research Phases 3-5 MANDATORY](feedback_deep_research_phases_mandatory.md) — Never skip CL verification, cross-model checks, self-audit, or presentation.
- [No autonomous deferrals](feedback_no_autonomous_deferrals.md) — Never defer any work without explicit user decision.
- [Permissions cleanup pattern](feedback_permissions_cleanup.md) — Clean project wildcards, empty local, cross-project patterns in global.
- [Statusline deployment process](feedback_statusline_rebuild_safety.md) — Versioned filenames + git checkout reload. Never overwrite running exe.
- [No premature next steps](feedback_no_premature_next_steps.md) — Don't jump to next phase unless asked. No over-surfacing. No session-end assumptions.
- [No broken widgets](feedback_no_broken_widgets.md) — Dashboard tabs ship complete or not at all. Fix data gaps before building, not after.
- [No agent budgets](feedback_no_agent_budgets.md) — Allocation formula is a planning floor, not a spending cap. Never track 'budget used.'
- [Agent stalling on large input](feedback_agent_stalling_pattern.md) — Subagents silently stall on 16+ files. Split into narrower-scoped agents.
- [No silent skill failures](feedback_no_silent_skill_failures.md) — Detect, retry with mitigation, report. Never silently skip steps.
- [TDMS intake path](feedback_tdms_intake_path.md) — Use scripts/debt/intake-manual.js, never write MASTER_DEBT.jsonl directly.
- [No incomplete agent findings](feedback_no_incomplete_agent_findings.md) — NEVER accept sampled/partial agent data. Dispatch fill-in agents for every item.
- [No unnecessary brainstorming](feedback_no_unnecessary_brainstorming.md) — Don't invoke /brainstorm when user has already decided what to do.
- [Routing menu adds value](feedback_routing_menu_value.md) — Repo-analysis routing menu with external routing discovery is valued.
- [No artificial caps](feedback_no_artificial_caps.md) — Don't cap candidate lists in synthesis. Show everything, organize for readability.
- [Wait at interactive gates](feedback_interactive_gates.md) — Hard stop at choice prompts. Never act on own question. Never bulk-accept ambiguous input.
- [Preferred workflow chain](feedback_workflow_chain.md) — brainstorm -> deep-research -> deep-plan -> execute. Never substitute superpowers skills.
- [Deep-research scope drift](feedback_scope_drift_deep_research.md) — Research the USER'S GOAL, not a sub-component. T28 lost a session to this.
- [No silent deferrals during execution](feedback_no_silent_deferrals_execution.md) — Never mark a step 'done' while skipping sub-items.
- [No stale CI assumption](feedback_no_stale_ci_assumption.md) — Never assume CI failures are stale. Verify commit SHA before dismissing.
- [Deep-plan Q&A format](feedback_deep_plan_qa_format.md) — Use deep-plan skill Q&A format for ad-hoc clarifying questions even when not invoking /deep-plan formally.
- [Write rejection = hard stop](feedback_write_rejection_hard_stop.md) — Hook-rejected Write = immediate Bash/Python retry. Never proceed with missing artifacts.
- [Repo analysis phase ordering](feedback_repo_analysis_phase_ordering.md) — 4b before 4, 6c before self-audit, coverage audit interactive, EXTRACTIONS.md in self-audit.
- [Agent config revert hazard](feedback_agent_config_revert_hazard.md) — Spawned agents can silently revert config changes. Verify shared files after agent edits.
- [Commit hook state files](feedback_commit_hook_state_files.md) — Include hook state files (.claude/state/, learning docs) in commits. Don't let them pile up.
- [No auto debt routing](feedback_no_auto_debt_routing.md) — Never defer to TDMS without presenting options. User decides what enters debt tracking.
- [Skills in plans are tool calls](feedback_skills_in_plans_are_tool_calls.md) — Slash commands in plan docs = Skill tool invocations. Never execute phases manually.
- [Worktree guidance](feedback_worktree_guidance.md) — Worktrees for research/planning. Branches for implementation. Skills/agents don't copy to worktrees.
- [No blanket count labels](feedback_no_blanket_count_labels.md) — Don't use frequency-based terms like 'singleton' as category labels. Describe substance, not count.
- [Adoption verdict in Creator View](feedback_adoption_verdict_in_creator_view.md) — For product repos, Creator View MUST produce Section 2b: Use-As-Is Verdict.
- [Testing with every write](feedback_testing_with_writes.md) — Every code change needs its own tests.
- [SoNash identity](project_sonash_identity.md) — SoNash = Sober Nashville. Recovery notebook for sobriety community.
- [Active initiatives](project_active_initiatives.md) — Master tracker (2026-04-08). T28 needs re-scoping. 11 repos analyzed, 142 candidates.
- [T28 Content Intelligence](project_t28_content_intelligence.md) — NEEDS RE-SCOPING. Goal: unify 4 skills. Data layer research was scope drift.
- [Repo analysis skill state](project_repo_analysis_v42.md) — v4.3 active. 11 repos, 142 candidates. repo-synthesis v1.2 audited.
- [Website analysis skill](project_website_analysis_skill.md) — SHIPPED. /website-analysis + /website-synthesis.
- [JASON-OS](project_jason_os.md) — Brainstorm COMPLETE (revisited). 17 domains, 35 decisions. Domain 02a active.
- [T29 synthesis consolidation](project_t29_synthesis_consolidation.md) — Wave 4 at 2/12. Handoff: .planning/synthesis-consolidation/WAVE4_RESUME.md
- [Cross-locale config](project_cross_locale_config.md) — Git-tracked vs local state. Branch-specific artifacts not visible cross-locale.
- [Hook contract CANON](project_hook_contract_canon.md) — hook-checks.json schema is CANON artifact.
- [Debt runner expansion](project_debt_runner_expansion.md) — Hybrid CLI+web approach. CLI writes, web dashboard reads. Research v2 complete.
- [Learning system analysis](project_learning_system_analysis.md) — 89.2% metric is vanity. Graduation pipeline broken. ITS analysis recommended.
- [Reviews system health](project_reviews_system_health.md) — JSONL source of truth, metrics auto-reconcile via lifecycle RECONCILE step.
- [Skill audit tracking broken](project_skill_audit_tracking_broken.md) — Only 5 audit state files exist but many more audited. Tracking mechanism incomplete.
- [SonarCloud fewer findings](project_sonarcloud_disabled.md) — Investigating why fewer issues during PR reviews. Workflow disable was red herring.
- [Codex plugin research](project_codex_plugin_research.md) — Evaluated but not adopted. Windows blocked. hookify plugin has higher near-term ROI.
- [External systems](reference_external_systems.md) — GitHub repo, Firebase project (sonash-app), SonarCloud dashboard URLs.
- [Documentation standards](reference_documentation_standards.md) — Doc headers, prettier-ignore blocks, version tables, docs:index generation.
- [TDMS systems](reference_tdms_systems.md) — Tech debt pipeline: intake, dedup, views. MASTER_DEBT overwrite hazard.
- [AI capabilities](reference_ai_capabilities.md) — MCP servers, 38 agents, 72 skills, GSD, agent teams, compaction resilience.
- [Statusline architecture](reference_statusline_architecture.md) — Go binary, build/config/cache paths, API integrations, settings override chain.
- [Pre-push skip vars](reference_pre_push_skip_vars.md) — SKIP_PROPAGATION, SKIP_WARNINGS, etc. 'pre-existing' rejected in SKIP_REASON.
- [Extraction journal as prior art](reference_extraction_journal.md) — Extractions ARE the data. Check before building. No analysis done until candidates in journal.
**Related memories:** - `feedback_workflow_chain.md` — preferred `/brainstorm -> /deep-research -> /deep-plan -> execute` workflow
**Related memories:** - `feedback_deep_plan_research_check.md` — Phase 0 Step 3 research check
**Related memories:** - `feedback_no_unnecessary_brainstorming.md` — don't invoke /brainstorm when the user has already decided what to build
**Related memory warning:** `reference_tdms_systems.md` notes 'MASTER_DEBT overwrite hazard' — this is a narrower form of that same warning.

Prose: 'Both converge on: never touch MASTER_DEBT.jsonl' — narrower form of overwrite hazard documented in reference_tdms_systems

- Pre-commit hook chain: see project_hook_contract_canon.md for details
